name: deploy

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main
      - dev
      - 
  workflow_dispatch:

permissions:
  contents: read
  pages: write
  id-token: write

jobs:
  deploy:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Install uv
        uses: astral-sh/setup-uv@v5
        with:
          enable-cache: true # This caches your virtualenv automatically!
          python-version: "3.12"

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: |
          uv pip install jupyter-book
          # Add any other dependencies your book needs here
          # uv pip install -r requirements.txt 

      - name: Build the book
        run: |
          uv run jupyter-book build .

      - name: Upload artifact
        uses: actions/upload-pages-artifact@v3
        with:
          path: _build/html

      - name: Deploy to GitHub Pages
        id: deployment
        uses: actions/deploy-pages@v4
